statement: PLAN-PHASE-006 'Retroactive issue migration' stands pending in the frozen .project and the 89-open-issue corpus it governs was never migrated into or reconciled against .context — .context/issues.json holds only new pi-context-era issues, and the 2026-07-11 carryforward audit's stated coverage was the eight work-item block files, leaving the issues store un-swept by every prior audit
action: Sweep the 89 open .project issues item-by-item and give each an explicit disposition: (a) substance independently resolved by later code/substrate work, (b) live defect in current packages (route to the known-broken stream, do not double-own), or (c) still-wanted work to re-file in .context; then enact or explicitly supersede PLAN-PHASE-006 rather than leaving it pending. Compare by content, never id — .context reuses issue- ids for unrelated content.
verify: Every open .project issue carries a recorded disposition (resolved-by / re-filed-as / retired-with-rationale) in .context or the audit ledger; PLAN-PHASE-006 no longer reads pending without a successor record.

history.note: Slice B .project completeness check: issues store was outside the 2026-07-11 audit's eight-file coverage; zero content carry into .context confirmed

statement: PLAN-PHASE-007 'Framework gap closure' stands pending and the frozen .project open framework-gap corpus — 114 non-terminal gaps including P0 defects against live packages (e.g. FGAP-153 resolvePromptField misclassification) — was never carried into or reconciled against .context: the two gap stores share zero titles, and no prior audit swept the framework-gaps store (the 2026-07-11 audit's coverage was the eight work-item block files)
action: Reconcile the 114 open .project gaps against current code and .context: disposition each as independently-closed-by-later-work, live-defect (route to known-broken stream), or still-wanted (re-file in .context); prioritize the P0/P1 clusters against live packages (FGAP-153..178 pi-jit-agents/pi-agent-dispatch agent-spec cluster, FGAP-139..150 pi-workflows capability cluster). Enact or explicitly supersede PLAN-PHASE-007 (whose own exit criteria cover only FGAP-001..006, of which FGAP-002/003/005 remain identified). Compare by content, never id — .context reuses FGAP- ids for unrelated content.
verify: Every non-terminal .project gap carries a recorded disposition; the P0 entries (FGAP-153, FGAP-157, FGAP-168) are either verified fixed in current code or re-filed live; PLAN-PHASE-007 no longer reads pending without a successor record.

history.note: Slice B .project completeness check: framework-gaps store was outside the 2026-07-11 audit's eight-file coverage; zero title overlap between .project open gaps and .context gaps confirmed

statement: Two vocabulary-settlement decisions stand open in the frozen .project decisions store with no .context counterpart and no enactment: DEC-0033 status-bucket normalization (.context config.status_buckets is still an empty map) and DEC-0034 conventions-schema facet migration (the .context conventions item schema is still the flat pre-lens shape — id/description/enforcement/severity, none of the title/category/applies_to/related_decisions/lifecycle/source facets; the FGAP-051 substance) — the decisions store was outside the 2026-07-11 audit's eight-file coverage
action: Settle both open decisions explicitly in .context: for DEC-0033 either author the status_buckets mapping or supersede it citing DEC-0039's absence-equals-degenerate-default rule (a legitimate reading that may make the empty map deliberate — this is why confidence is class-level, not code-verified); for DEC-0034 either run the conventions-schema facet migration or supersede with rationale. Do not leave them open-by-omission in a frozen store.

out: DEC-0050/0051 (same substance as FEAT-008/009, covered by DW-13/DW-14)

verify: Each of DEC-0033/0034 has a .context-recorded enactment or supersession; if enacted, config.status_buckets is non-empty and consumed, and the conventions item schema carries the discoverability facets with the 45+ existing rules migrated.

history.note: Slice B .project completeness check: decisions store was outside the 2026-07-11 audit's eight-file coverage; DEC-0050/0051 residue already covered by DW-13/14, DEC-0033/0034 covered by no atom
